chunks.title: First Oracle and Blessing
chunks.reason: Contains the preparation of altars, Balaam's first oracle delivered to Balak, and Balak's frustrated response.

chunks.title: Second Oracle and Blessing
chunks.reason: Describes the move to Pisgah, Balaam's second oracle emphasizing God's faithfulness, and Balak's complaint.

chunks.title: Third Oracle Setup
chunks.reason: Narrates the move to Peor and the final preparation of altars for a third attempt.
